Please share this link for anyone in need of rescue from flooding, fires, or the aftermath of Hurricane Milton. It’s crucial to share before the storm hits, as communication may be disrupted afterward. We are a veteran-led nonprofit rescue group, Grey Bull Rescue, trained and ready to assist. We successfully helped during Hurricane Helene and still have crews in North Carolina. We're here to help with Milton as well.
